mapper.select: SELECT id,user_id,nickname,content,contact,reply_content,reply_time, status,create_time,is_deleted FROM message WHERE is_deleted=0 AND user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id,user_id,nickname,content,contact,reply_content,reply_time, status,create_time,is_deleted FROM message WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_deleted=1 WHERE id=#{id}
